decision: Publish a checksummed and attested standalone installer that verifies the skill package before repository writes and delegates canonical model updates to the Project Context CLI.
reason: A deterministic installer removes agent-specific implementations while preserving the signed release boundary and the CLI's atomic model mutation guarantees.
rejected: Execute an unverified curl pipe shell bootstrap
Let each installation agent reimplement archive, marker, and model mutation logic
subject: installer trust boundary

decision: Reconstruct durable history through a separately invoked repository-local skill and apply qualified model and event candidates automatically after an explicit source-scope gate.
reason: History collection has broader privacy and completeness concerns than routine context retrieval, while automatic evidence-constrained application avoids requiring users to review every candidate.
rejected: Run reconstruction automatically with the ordinary project-context skill.
Require a candidate-by-candidate user review after source approval.
subject: local history reconstruction boundary
